title: Higher-Order Operations, Map, Filter, and Fold · Composition Transfer
summary: Summarize a stream of service records without hand-written accumulator loops. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a tested map-filter-fold analytics pipeline with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use mapping for one-output-per-input transformations without smuggling filtering effects.
Design total predicates that retain records for explicit, testable reasons.
Define an accumulator identity and invariant before implementing a fold.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
